stonetop.summary: A gang of craggy fae brawlers in iron boots, sworn never to start a fight.

system.concept: A gang of craggy fae brawlers in iron boots, sworn never to start a fight.
system.description: A gang of hoodlums, with names like Hobnail, Spitkicker, Big Thunk, Tusk, and Grub: short, squat brutes with lopsided limbs, mismatched parts, and craggy skin, stomping about in oversized iron-shod boots and delighting in the disgust of other @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.Ej5WiMs30baKNXW3]{Fae}. Back in the day they quarried stone; given the chance to fight and spill blood, they became among the most feared shock-troops of the war, first into the fray and dyeing their Red Pennant in trodden foes. After the war, some schemer bought every debt they owed and extracted a promise: no starting fights. They can finish one someone else starts, though — and oh, will they enjoy it.
